# Zyos Group

> Agentic AI consulting for SMBs, PE, and associations. We assess operational maturity, architect the right solution for your context, build the integrated foundation (Business Intelligence + Software + Operations + Agents running across), and execute the roadmap that infuses AI into how you operate — measured against business performance.

Zyos Group is an ROI-focused agentic-transformation partner founded in 2009 by Paul Ruddy. We run two arms — Consulting (Software & Data, Digital Transformation, Operations & Scaling, Integrated Marketing) and Solutions (Agent as a Service, Growth as a Service) — both delivered on the Zyos Operating System. Every engagement starts with the Opportunity Engine intake and Process Intelligence Implementation as the first delivery cycle. Engagement models: Fixed Price, Retainer (including Build & Operate), or As-A-Service.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://zyosgroup.com/): Tagline, hero, three integrated service components, operating model, ICPs, two arms, Opportunity Engine demo
- [Framework](https://zyosgroup.com/framework): The Zyos Readiness + Maturity Scorecard. Five dimensions scored before any SOW. Routing decisions: Engagement recommended / Conditions to address / Not yet — revisit
- [Foundation](https://zyosgroup.com/foundation): Process Intelligence Implementation, the six deliverables, and the Solution Architecture brief addressing security, ownership, maintenance, and evolution
- [How We Deliver](https://zyosgroup.com/how-we-deliver): Measure → Deliver → Continuously Improve. Three phases plus 11 named Customer Success features
- [Platform](https://zyosgroup.com/platform): Zyos Operating System — intake → scoring → proposal → Kanban → CS → QBR. One connected system
- [About](https://zyosgroup.com/about): Founded by Paul Ruddy. Two decades in IT managed services, software, and business intelligence

## Solutions (productized, monthly recurring)

- [Solutions](https://zyosgroup.com/solutions): Productized continuous services. Agent as a Service + Growth as a Service. Always As-A-Service. Support baked into the recurring fee
- [Agent as a Service](https://zyosgroup.com/solutions/agent-as-a-service): We design, deploy, and run AI agents on your behalf. Variants — Workflows, Systems, Middleware, Lean, Insights
- [Growth as a Service](https://zyosgroup.com/solutions/growth-as-a-service): Continuous growth operations for SMB B2B — website, GBP, ads + LSA, SEO content, GEO

## Consulting (human-led, scoped, expert)

- [Consulting](https://zyosgroup.com/consulting): Four practice areas. Fixed Price or Retainer. PI Implementation is always Sprint 1 of Retainer
- [Software & Data](https://zyosgroup.com/consulting/software-and-data): Custom application development, AI agent development, data platforms, integrations, BI dashboards
- [Digital Transformation](https://zyosgroup.com/consulting/digital-transformation): End-to-end programs from legacy operations to modern, AI-augmented workflows
- [Operations & Scaling](https://zyosgroup.com/consulting/operations-and-scaling): OKR / KPI systems, Customer Success cadence, operating-model design
- [Integrated Marketing](https://zyosgroup.com/consulting/integrated-marketing): SEO + GEO + content engine + paid + analytics + measurement

## Who we serve (three ICPs)

- [Who we serve](https://zyosgroup.com/who-we-serve): Same operating model, context-specific architecture
- [High-Growth SMBs](https://zyosgroup.com/who-we-serve/high-growth-smbs): 10–200-employee B2B on a growth trajectory. Primarily GaaS
- [Private Equity](https://zyosgroup.com/who-we-serve/private-equity): PE firms + portfolio companies. Primarily Build & Operate Retainer
- [Associations](https://zyosgroup.com/who-we-serve/associations): Non-profit + member organizations. AMS-aware architecture (iMIS, NetForum, Personify in scoping)

## By function (agentic AI applied)

- [Sales](https://zyosgroup.com/by-function/sales): Outbound + ABM, pipeline hygiene, reply triage, win/loss intelligence
- [Marketing](https://zyosgroup.com/by-function/marketing)
- [Finance](https://zyosgroup.com/by-function/finance)
- [HR](https://zyosgroup.com/by-function/hr)
- [Information Technology](https://zyosgroup.com/by-function/information-technology)
- [Logistics](https://zyosgroup.com/by-function/logistics)

## Conversion

- [Start (Opportunity Engine intake)](https://zyosgroup.com/start): Four questions. Ninety seconds. Diagnostic in your inbox within 60 minutes. Scoped proposal by next business day

## Content

- [Case Studies](https://zyosgroup.com/case-studies): Quantified outcomes — revenue, cost, risk, time, quality. Anonymized where customer permission is pending
- [The Zyos Brief](https://zyosgroup.com/the-brief): Paul Ruddy's monthly LinkedIn Newsletter on agentic AI, operating systems for services firms, and what Zyos shipped

## Related properties

- [zyos.io](https://zyos.io): The Zyos Operating System product (SaaS) — license to run your own services firm on the same platform
- [paulruddy.com](https://paulruddy.com): Founder site — operator-grade go-to-market and agentic AI essays

## Canonical claims (claimable facts about Zyos Group)

- Engagement models: Fixed Price · Retainer (Standard or Build & Operate) · As-A-Service (Agent as a Service / Growth as a Service)
- Operating model: Measure → Deliver → Continuously Improve, with Customer Success operationalized via 11 named features
- Five canonical outcomes every engagement is measured against: Increase automation · Grow revenue · Reduce risk · Enhance processes · Improve scale
- Process Intelligence is always the first delivery cycle of every Retainer and As-A-Service engagement
- Routing decisions use exact language: "Engagement recommended" (RS ≥ 3.0), "Conditions to address" (RS 2.0–2.9), "Not yet — revisit" (RS < 2.0)
- Build & Operate Retainer pricing: $7K/month · 40 hours · $175/hr blended · 3-month minimum
- Founded 2009 by Paul Ruddy. Headquartered in New Jersey, USA
